cycles.name: Data & Board Model
cycles.scope: Board model (board.py): 40 squares with rents, house/hotel costs, mortgages, color groups, railroads, utilities loaded from data/board_standard.yaml. Italian variant name mapping in data/board_italia.yaml. Dice module (dice.py): 2d6 distribution, doubles detection, 3-doubles-to-jail rule. Chance and Community Chest decks (cards.py): 16 cards per deck from data/cards_standard.yaml, FIFO queue management, Get Out of Jail Free card removal/reinsertion, typed card objects with effect enums. pyproject.toml and environment.yml setup. Property-based tests for board invariants (mortgage = price/2, row sums) and card deck cycle correctness (chi-squared frequency test).

cycles.name: Game Engine & Strategies
cycles.scope: Deterministic game engine (game.py): full game state, turn resolution, jail logic (up to 3 double-roll attempts), bankruptcy detection, $200 salary on passing Go, Income/Luxury Tax, property buying, house/hotel building with housing shortage rule, mortgage/unmortgage with 10% interest. Pluggable strategy interface and all strategy implementations (strategies/): BuyEverything, BuyNothing, ColorTargeted(orange|lightblue|darkblue), ThreeHousesRush, JailCamper, Trader. Tests: ≥90% coverage on engine, property tests for money conservation invariant, 2–6 player games complete without errors.

cycles.name: Analytics & Simulation
cycles.scope: Closed-form Markov chain analysis (markov.py): 40×40 transition matrix incorporating Chance/Community Chest movement and jail logic, stationary distribution computation, validation against known values (Jail ~5.89%, Illinois Ave ~3.18%). Expected rent per roll and ROI per color group (metrics.py): ranking at 0–4 houses and hotel, payback period computation. Vectorized Monte Carlo simulation (simulate.py): ≥10⁵ games per configuration, numba-accelerated hot path, ≥50k games/minute, parallelized across configurations. Tournament system (tournament.py): round-robin between all strategies, Bradley-Terry/Elo ranking, ablation study on key parameters. Win probability tables with Wilson confidence intervals.

cycles.name: Visualization, CLI & Output
cycles.scope: All video-ready visualizations (plots.py): board heatmap by stationary probability, ROI bar chart per color at 0–5 buildings, win rate curves per strategy, sample game animation, net worth over time chart — all 1920×1080, colorblind-friendly palette, Italian labels. Typer CLI (cli.py): commands simulate, markov, tournament, plot <figure>, export-video with --seed flag. Narrative script (scripts/come_vincere_al_monopoli.py): end-to-end pipeline regenerating all figures. Video script document (docs/video_script.md). Makefile target make video-assets.
